tools.name: gha_scan_workflows
tools.description: Scan existing GitHub Actions workflow files and report their structure (triggers, jobs, actions, environments, secrets).

tools.name: gha_validate_workflow
tools.description: Validate a GitHub Actions workflow YAML file for correctness, security best practices, and common pitfalls.

params.name: file
params.description: Path to the workflow YAML file to validate

tools.name: gha_scan_ci_config
tools.description: Detect and parse CI/CD configuration files from other systems (Jenkins, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Azure Pipelines) for migration analysis.

params.name: root_dir
params.description: Repository root directory to scan for CI configs
